urdu_text: کیا ہم نے آپ کا سینہ نہیں کھول دیا
alt_text: Image of Quran 94:1 (Surah al-Sharh, verse 1) with Arabic ayat and Urdu translation: 'Did We not expand your breast for you?'
notes: Quran widget image. Pairs with image 030 (20:25 — Musa's prayer for expansion) as the Prophet Muhammad's corresponding granted expansion.
